9#ifndef ZEPHYR_INCLUDE_BLUETOOTH_HCI_TYPES_H_
10#define ZEPHYR_INCLUDE_BLUETOOTH_HCI_TYPES_H_
11
12#include <stdbool.h>
13#include <stdint.h>
14
15#include <zephyr/bluetooth/addr.h>
16#include <zephyr/sys/util.h>
17#include <zephyr/sys/util_macro.h>
18#include <zephyr/toolchain.h>
19#include <zephyr/types.h>

25/* Bluetooth spec v5.4 Vol 4, Part A Table 2.1: HCI packet indicators
26 * The following definitions are intended for use with the UART Transport Layer and
27 * may be reused with other transport layers if desired.
28 */
29#define BT_HCI_H4_NONE 0x00 /* None of the known packet types */
30#define BT_HCI_H4_CMD 0x01 /* HCI Command packet */
31#define BT_HCI_H4_ACL 0x02 /* HCI ACL Data packet */
32#define BT_HCI_H4_SCO 0x03 /* HCI Synchronous Data packet */
33#define BT_HCI_H4_EVT 0x04 /* HCI Event packet */
34#define BT_HCI_H4_ISO 0x05 /* HCI ISO Data packet */
35
36#define BT_HCI_OWN_ADDR_PUBLIC 0x00
37#define BT_HCI_OWN_ADDR_RANDOM 0x01
38#define BT_HCI_OWN_ADDR_RPA_OR_PUBLIC 0x02
39#define BT_HCI_OWN_ADDR_RPA_OR_RANDOM 0x03
40#define BT_HCI_OWN_ADDR_RPA_MASK 0x02
41
42#define BT_HCI_PEER_ADDR_RPA_UNRESOLVED 0xfe
43#define BT_HCI_PEER_ADDR_ANONYMOUS 0xff
44
45#define BT_ENC_KEY_SIZE_MIN 0x07
46#define BT_ENC_KEY_SIZE_MAX 0x10
47
48#define BT_HCI_ADV_HANDLE_INVALID 0xff
49#define BT_HCI_SYNC_HANDLE_INVALID 0xffff
50#define BT_HCI_PAWR_SUBEVENT_MAX 128
51
52/* Bluetooth spec v5.4 Vol 4, Part E - 5.4.3 HCI Synchronous Data Packets */
53struct bt_hci_sco_hdr {
54 uint16_t handle; /* 12 bit handle, 2 bit Packet Status Flag, 1 bit RFU */
55 uint8_t len;
56} __packed;
57#define BT_HCI_SCO_HDR_SIZE 3
58
59/* Bluetooth spec v5.4 Vol 4, Part E - 5.4.4 HCI Event Packet */
60struct bt_hci_evt_hdr {
61 uint8_t evt;
62 uint8_t len;
63 uint8_t data[];
64} __packed;
65#define BT_HCI_EVT_HDR_SIZE 2
66
67#define BT_ACL_START_NO_FLUSH 0x00
68#define BT_ACL_CONT 0x01
69#define BT_ACL_START 0x02
70#define BT_ACL_COMPLETE 0x03
71
72#define BT_ACL_POINT_TO_POINT 0x00
73#define BT_ACL_BROADCAST 0x01
74
75#define BT_ACL_HANDLE_MASK BIT_MASK(12)
76
77#define bt_acl_handle(h) ((h) & BT_ACL_HANDLE_MASK)
78#define bt_acl_flags(h) ((h) >> 12)
79#define bt_acl_flags_pb(f) ((f) & BIT_MASK(2))
80#define bt_acl_flags_bc(f) ((f) >> 2)
81#define bt_acl_handle_pack(h, f) ((h) | ((f) << 12))
82
83/* Bluetooth spec v5.4 Vol 4, Part E - 5.4.2 ACL Data Packets */
84struct bt_hci_acl_hdr {
85 uint16_t handle;
86 uint16_t len;
87} __packed;
88#define BT_HCI_ACL_HDR_SIZE 4
89
90#define BT_ISO_START 0x00
91#define BT_ISO_CONT 0x01
92#define BT_ISO_SINGLE 0x02
93#define BT_ISO_END 0x03
94
95#define bt_iso_handle(h) ((h) & 0x0fff)
96#define bt_iso_flags(h) ((h) >> 12)
97#define bt_iso_flags_pb(f) ((f) & 0x0003)
98#define bt_iso_flags_ts(f) (((f) >> 2) & 0x0001)
99#define bt_iso_pack_flags(pb, ts) \
100 (((pb) & 0x0003) | (((ts) & 0x0001) << 2))
101#define bt_iso_handle_pack(h, pb, ts) \
102 ((h) | (bt_iso_pack_flags(pb, ts) << 12))
103#define bt_iso_hdr_len(h) ((h) & BIT_MASK(14))
104
105#define BT_ISO_DATA_VALID 0x00
106#define BT_ISO_DATA_INVALID 0x01
107#define BT_ISO_DATA_NOP 0x02
108
109#define bt_iso_pkt_len(h) ((h) & BIT_MASK(12))
110#define bt_iso_pkt_flags(h) ((h) >> 14)
111#define bt_iso_pkt_len_pack(h, f) (((h) & BIT_MASK(12)) | ((f) << 14))
112
113struct bt_hci_iso_sdu_hdr {
114 uint16_t sn;
115 uint16_t slen; /* 12 bit len, 2 bit RFU, 2 bit packet status */
116} __packed;
117#define BT_HCI_ISO_SDU_HDR_SIZE 4
118
119struct bt_hci_iso_sdu_ts_hdr {
120 uint32_t ts;
121 struct bt_hci_iso_sdu_hdr sdu;
122} __packed;
123#define BT_HCI_ISO_SDU_TS_HDR_SIZE 8
124
125/* Bluetooth spec v5.4 Vol 4, Part E - 5.4.5 HCI ISO Data Packets */
126struct bt_hci_iso_hdr {
127 uint16_t handle; /* 12 bit handle, 2 bit PB flags, 1 bit TS_Flag, 1 bit RFU */
128 uint16_t len; /* 14 bits, 2 bits RFU */
129} __packed;
130#define BT_HCI_ISO_HDR_SIZE 4
131
132/* Bluetooth spec v5.4 Vol 4, Part E - 5.4.1 HCI Command Packet */
133struct bt_hci_cmd_hdr {
134 uint16_t opcode;
135 uint8_t param_len;
136} __packed;
137#define BT_HCI_CMD_HDR_SIZE 3
138
139/* Supported Commands */
140#define BT_CMD_TEST(cmd, octet, bit) (cmd[octet] & BIT(bit))
141#define BT_CMD_LE_STATES(cmd) BT_CMD_TEST(cmd, 28, 3)
142
143#define BT_FEAT_TEST(feat, page, octet, bit) ((feat[page][octet] & BIT(bit)) != 0)
144
145#define BT_FEAT_BREDR(feat) !BT_FEAT_TEST(feat, 0, 4, 5)
146#define BT_FEAT_LE(feat) BT_FEAT_TEST(feat, 0, 4, 6)
147#define BT_FEAT_EXT_FEATURES(feat) BT_FEAT_TEST(feat, 0, 7, 7)
148#define BT_FEAT_HOST_SSP(feat) BT_FEAT_TEST(feat, 1, 0, 0)
149#define BT_FEAT_SC(feat) BT_FEAT_TEST(feat, 2, 1, 0)
150
151#define BT_FEAT_LMP_SCO_CAPABLE(feat) BT_FEAT_TEST(feat, 0, 1, 3)
152#define BT_FEAT_LMP_ESCO_CAPABLE(feat) BT_FEAT_TEST(feat, 0, 3, 7)
153#define BT_FEAT_HV2_PKT(feat) BT_FEAT_TEST(feat, 0, 1, 4)
154#define BT_FEAT_HV3_PKT(feat) BT_FEAT_TEST(feat, 0, 1, 5)
155#define BT_FEAT_EV4_PKT(feat) BT_FEAT_TEST(feat, 0, 4, 0)
156#define BT_FEAT_EV5_PKT(feat) BT_FEAT_TEST(feat, 0, 4, 1)
157#define BT_FEAT_2EV3_PKT(feat) BT_FEAT_TEST(feat, 0, 5, 5)
158#define BT_FEAT_3EV3_PKT(feat) BT_FEAT_TEST(feat, 0, 5, 6)
159#define BT_FEAT_3SLOT_PKT(feat) BT_FEAT_TEST(feat, 0, 5, 7)
160
161/* LE features */
162#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_ENC 0
163#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CONN_PARAM_REQ 1
164#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_EXT_REJ_IND 2
165#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PER_INIT_FEAT_XCHG 3
166#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PING 4
167#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_DLE 5
168#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PRIVACY 6
169#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_EXT_SCAN 7
170#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PHY_2M 8
171#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_SMI_TX 9
172#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_SMI_RX 10
173#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PHY_CODED 11
174#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_EXT_ADV 12
175#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PER_ADV 13
176#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CHAN_SEL_ALGO_2 14
177#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PWR_CLASS_1 15
178#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_MIN_USED_CHAN_PROC 16
179#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CONN_CTE_REQ 17
180#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CONN_CTE_RESP 18
181#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CONNECTIONLESS_CTE_TX 19
182#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CONNECTIONLESS_CTE_RX 20
183#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_ANT_SWITCH_TX_AOD 21
184#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_ANT_SWITCH_RX_AOA 22
185#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_RX_CTE 23
186#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PAST_SEND 24
187#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PAST_RECV 25
188#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_SCA_UPDATE 26
189#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_REMOTE_PUB_KEY_VALIDATE 27
190#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CIS_CENTRAL 28
191#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CIS_PERIPHERAL 29
192#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_ISO_BROADCASTER 30
193#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_SYNC_RECEIVER 31
194#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_ISO_CHANNELS 32
195#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PWR_CTRL_REQ 33
196#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PWR_CHG_IND 34
197#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PATH_LOSS_MONITOR 35
198#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PER_ADV_ADI_SUPP 36
199#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CONN_SUBRATING 37
200#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CONN_SUBRATING_HOST_SUPP 38
201#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CHANNEL_CLASSIFICATION 39
202#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_ADV_CODING_SEL 40
203#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_ADV_CODING_SEL_HOST 41
204#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_DECISION_ADV_FILTER 42
205#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PAWR_ADVERTISER 43
206#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PAWR_SCANNER 44
207#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_UNSEG_FRAMED_MODE 45
208#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CHANNEL_SOUNDING 46
209#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CHANNEL_SOUNDING_HOST 47
210#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CHANNEL_SOUNDING_TONE_QUAL_IND 48
211#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_EXTENDED_FEAT_SET 63
212#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_FRAME_SPACE_UPDATE 65
213#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_SHORTER_CONN_INTERVALS 72
214#define BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_SHORTER_CONN_INTERVALS_HOST_SUPP 73
215
216#define BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, n) (feat[(n) >> 3] & \
217 BIT((n) & 7))
218
219#define BT_FEAT_LE_ENCR(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
220 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_ENC)
221#define BT_FEAT_LE_CONN_PARAM_REQ_PROC(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
222 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CONN_PARAM_REQ)
223#define BT_FEAT_LE_PER_INIT_FEAT_XCHG(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
224 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PER_INIT_FEAT_XCHG)
225#define BT_FEAT_LE_DLE(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
226 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_DLE)
227#define BT_FEAT_LE_PHY_2M(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
228 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PHY_2M)
229#define BT_FEAT_LE_PHY_CODED(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
230 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PHY_CODED)
231#define BT_FEAT_LE_PRIVACY(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
232 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PRIVACY)
233#define BT_FEAT_LE_EXT_ADV(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
234 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_EXT_ADV)
235#define BT_FEAT_LE_EXT_PER_ADV(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
236 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PER_ADV)
237#define BT_FEAT_LE_CONNECTION_CTE_REQ(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
238 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CONN_CTE_REQ)
239#define BT_FEAT_LE_CONNECTION_CTE_RESP(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
240 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CONN_CTE_RESP)
241#define BT_FEAT_LE_CONNECTIONLESS_CTE_TX(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
242 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CONNECTIONLESS_CTE_TX)
243#define BT_FEAT_LE_CONNECTIONLESS_CTE_RX(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
244 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CONNECTIONLESS_CTE_RX)
245#define BT_FEAT_LE_ANT_SWITCH_TX_AOD(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
246 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_ANT_SWITCH_TX_AOD)
247#define BT_FEAT_LE_ANT_SWITCH_RX_AOA(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
248 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_ANT_SWITCH_RX_AOA)
249#define BT_FEAT_LE_RX_CTE(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
250 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_RX_CTE)
251#define BT_FEAT_LE_PAST_SEND(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
252 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PAST_SEND)
253#define BT_FEAT_LE_PAST_RECV(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
254 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PAST_RECV)
255#define BT_FEAT_LE_CIS_CENTRAL(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
256 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CIS_CENTRAL)
257#define BT_FEAT_LE_CIS_PERIPHERAL(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
258 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CIS_PERIPHERAL)
259#define BT_FEAT_LE_ISO_BROADCASTER(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
260 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_ISO_BROADCASTER)
261#define BT_FEAT_LE_SYNC_RECEIVER(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
262 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_SYNC_RECEIVER)
263#define BT_FEAT_LE_ISO_CHANNELS(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
264 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_ISO_CHANNELS)
265#define BT_FEAT_LE_PWR_CTRL_REQ(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
266 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PWR_CTRL_REQ)
267#define BT_FEAT_LE_PWR_CHG_IND(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
268 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PWR_CHG_IND)
269#define BT_FEAT_LE_PATH_LOSS_MONITOR(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
270 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PATH_LOSS_MONITOR)
271#define BT_FEAT_LE_PER_ADV_ADI_SUPP(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
272 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PER_ADV_ADI_SUPP)
273#define BT_FEAT_LE_CONN_SUBRATING(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
274 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CONN_SUBRATING)
275#define BT_FEAT_LE_CONN_SUBRATING_HOST_SUPP(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
276 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CONN_SUBRATING_HOST_SUPP)
277#define BT_FEAT_LE_CHANNEL_CLASSIFICATION(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
278 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CHANNEL_CLASSIFICATION)
279#define BT_FEAT_LE_ADV_CODING_SEL(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
280 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_ADV_CODING_SEL)
281#define BT_FEAT_LE_ADV_CODING_SEL_HOST(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
282 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_ADV_CODING_SEL_HOST)
283#define BT_FEAT_LE_PAWR_ADVERTISER(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
284 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PAWR_ADVERTISER)
285#define BT_FEAT_LE_PAWR_SCANNER(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
286 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_PAWR_SCANNER)
287#define BT_FEAT_LE_CHANNEL_SOUNDING(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
288 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CHANNEL_SOUNDING)
289#define BT_FEAT_LE_CHANNEL_SOUNDING_HOST(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
290 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_CHANNEL_SOUNDING_HOST)
291#define BT_FEAT_LE_EXTENDED_FEAT_SET(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
292 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_EXTENDED_FEAT_SET)
293#define BT_FEAT_LE_FRAME_SPACE_UPDATE_SET(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
294 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_FRAME_SPACE_UPDATE)
295#define BT_FEAT_LE_SHORTER_CONN_INTERVALS(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
296 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_SHORTER_CONN_INTERVALS)
297#define BT_FEAT_LE_SHORTER_CONN_INTERVALS_HOST_SUPP(feat) BT_LE_FEAT_TEST(feat, \
298 BT_LE_FEAT_BIT_SHORTER_CONN_INTERVALS_HOST_SUPP)
299
300#define BT_FEAT_LE_CIS(feat) (BT_FEAT_LE_CIS_CENTRAL(feat) | \
301 BT_FEAT_LE_CIS_PERIPHERAL(feat))
302#define BT_FEAT_LE_BIS(feat) (BT_FEAT_LE_ISO_BROADCASTER(feat) | \
303 BT_FEAT_LE_SYNC_RECEIVER(feat))
304#define BT_FEAT_LE_ISO(feat) (BT_FEAT_LE_CIS(feat) | \
305 BT_FEAT_LE_BIS(feat))
306
307/* LE States. See Core_v5.4, Vol 4, Part E, Section 7.8.27 */
308#define BT_LE_STATES_PER_CONN_ADV(states) (states & BIT64_MASK(38))
309
310#if defined(CONFIG_BT_SCAN_AND_INITIATE_IN_PARALLEL)
311/* Both passive and active scanner can be run in parallel with initiator. */
312#define BT_LE_STATES_SCAN_INIT(states) ((states) & BIT64_MASK(22) && \
313 (states) & BIT64_MASK(23))
314
315#else
316#define BT_LE_STATES_SCAN_INIT(states) 0
317#endif
318
319/* Bonding/authentication types */
320#define BT_HCI_NO_BONDING 0x00
321#define BT_HCI_NO_BONDING_MITM 0x01
322#define BT_HCI_DEDICATED_BONDING 0x02
323#define BT_HCI_DEDICATED_BONDING_MITM 0x03
324#define BT_HCI_GENERAL_BONDING 0x04
325#define BT_HCI_GENERAL_BONDING_MITM 0x05
326
327/*
328 * MITM protection is enabled in SSP authentication requirements octet when
329 * LSB bit is set.
330 */
331#define BT_MITM 0x01
332
333/* I/O capabilities */
334#define BT_IO_DISPLAY_ONLY 0x00
335#define BT_IO_DISPLAY_YESNO 0x01
336#define BT_IO_KEYBOARD_ONLY 0x02
337#define BT_IO_NO_INPUT_OUTPUT 0x03
338
339/* SCO packet types */
340#define HCI_PKT_TYPE_HV1 0x0020
341#define HCI_PKT_TYPE_HV2 0x0040
342#define HCI_PKT_TYPE_HV3 0x0080
343
344/* eSCO packet types */
345#define HCI_PKT_TYPE_SCO_HV1 0x0001
346#define HCI_PKT_TYPE_SCO_HV2 0x0002
347#define HCI_PKT_TYPE_SCO_HV3 0x0004
348#define HCI_PKT_TYPE_ESCO_EV3 0x0008
349#define HCI_PKT_TYPE_ESCO_EV4 0x0010
350#define HCI_PKT_TYPE_ESCO_EV5 0x0020
351#define HCI_PKT_TYPE_ESCO_2EV3 0x0040
352#define HCI_PKT_TYPE_ESCO_3EV3 0x0080
353#define HCI_PKT_TYPE_ESCO_2EV5 0x0100
354#define HCI_PKT_TYPE_ESCO_3EV5 0x0200
355
356
357#define ESCO_PKT_MASK (HCI_PKT_TYPE_SCO_HV1 | \
358 HCI_PKT_TYPE_SCO_HV2 | \
359 HCI_PKT_TYPE_SCO_HV3 | \
360 HCI_PKT_TYPE_ESCO_EV3 | \
361 HCI_PKT_TYPE_ESCO_EV4 | \
362 HCI_PKT_TYPE_ESCO_EV5)
363#define SCO_PKT_MASK (HCI_PKT_TYPE_SCO_HV1 | \
364 HCI_PKT_TYPE_SCO_HV2 | \
365 HCI_PKT_TYPE_SCO_HV3)
366#define EDR_ESCO_PKT_MASK (HCI_PKT_TYPE_ESCO_2EV3 | \
367 HCI_PKT_TYPE_ESCO_3EV3 | \
368 HCI_PKT_TYPE_ESCO_2EV5 | \
369 HCI_PKT_TYPE_ESCO_3EV5)
370
371/* HCI BR/EDR link types */
372#define BT_HCI_SCO 0x00
373#define BT_HCI_ACL 0x01
374#define BT_HCI_ESCO 0x02
375
376/* OpCode Group Fields */
377#define BT_OGF_LINK_CTRL 0x01
378#define BT_OGF_LINK_POLICY 0x02
379#define BT_OGF_BASEBAND 0x03
380#define BT_OGF_INFO 0x04
381#define BT_OGF_STATUS 0x05
382#define BT_OGF_LE 0x08
383#define BT_OGF_VS 0x3f
384
385/* Construct OpCode from OGF and OCF */
386#define BT_OP(ogf, ocf) ((ocf) | ((ogf) << 10))
387
388/* Invalid opcode */
389#define BT_OP_NOP 0x0000
390
391/* Obtain OGF from OpCode */
392#define BT_OGF(opcode) (((opcode) >> 10) & BIT_MASK(6))
393/* Obtain OCF from OpCode */
394#define BT_OCF(opcode) ((opcode) & BIT_MASK(10))
395
396#define BT_HCI_OP_INQUIRY BT_OP(BT_OGF_LINK_CTRL, 0x0001) /* 0x0401 */
397struct bt_hci_op_inquiry {
398 uint8_t lap[3];
399 uint8_t length;
400 uint8_t num_rsp;
401} __packed;
402
403#define BT_HCI_OP_INQUIRY_CANCEL BT_OP(BT_OGF_LINK_CTRL, 0x0002) /* 0x0402 */
404
405#define BT_HCI_OP_CONNECT BT_OP(BT_OGF_LINK_CTRL, 0x0005) /* 0x0405 */
406struct bt_hci_cp_connect {
407 bt_addr_t bdaddr;
408 uint16_t packet_type;
409 uint8_t pscan_rep_mode;
410 uint8_t reserved;
411 uint16_t clock_offset;
412 uint8_t allow_role_switch;
413} __packed;
414
415#define BT_HCI_OP_DISCONNECT BT_OP(BT_OGF_LINK_CTRL, 0x0006) /* 0x0406 */
416struct bt_hci_cp_disconnect {
417 uint16_t handle;
418 uint8_t reason;
419} __packed;
420
421#define BT_HCI_OP_CONNECT_CANCEL BT_OP(BT_OGF_LINK_CTRL, 0x0008) /* 0x0408 */
422struct bt_hci_cp_connect_cancel {
423 bt_addr_t bdaddr;
424} __packed;
425struct bt_hci_rp_connect_cancel {
426 uint8_t status;
427 bt_addr_t bdaddr;
428} __packed;
429
430#define BT_HCI_OP_ACCEPT_CONN_REQ BT_OP(BT_OGF_LINK_CTRL, 0x0009) /* 0x0409 */
431struct bt_hci_cp_accept_conn_req {
432 bt_addr_t bdaddr;
433 uint8_t role;
434} __packed;
435
436#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_AIR_CODING_FMT_CVSD 0x00
437#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_AIR_CODING_FMT_ULAW 0x01
438#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_AIR_CODING_FMT_ALAW 0x02
439#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_AIR_CODING_FMT_TRANSPARENT 0x03
440
441#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_PCM_BIT_POS_DEFAULT 0x00
442
443#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_SAMPLE_SIZE_8_BITS 0x00
444#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_SAMPLE_SIZE_16_BITS 0x01
445
446#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_DATA_FMT_1_COMPLEMENT 0x00
447#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_DATA_FMT_2_COMPLEMENT 0x01
448#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_DATA_FMT_SIGNED 0x02
449#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_DATA_FMT_UNSIGNED 0x03
450
451#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_CODING_FMT_LINEAR 0x00
452#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_CODING_FMT_ULAW 0x01
453#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_CODING_FMT_ALAW 0x02
454
455#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_AIR_CODING_FMT_MASK GENMASK(1, 0)
456#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_PCM_BIT_POS_MASK GENMASK(2, 4)
457#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_SAMPLE_SIZE_MASK GENMASK(5, 5)
458#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_DATA_FMT_MASK GENMASK(7, 6)
459#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_CODING_FMT_MASK GENMASK(9, 8)
460
461#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_AIR_CODING_FMT_PREP(val) \
462 FIELD_PREP(BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_AIR_CODING_FMT_MASK, val)
463#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_PCM_BIT_POS_PREP(val) \
464 FIELD_PREP(BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_PCM_BIT_POS_MASK, val)
465#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_SAMPLE_SIZE_PREP(val) \
466 FIELD_PREP(BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_SAMPLE_SIZE_MASK, val)
467#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_DATA_FMT_PREP(val) FIELD_PREP(BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_DATA_FMT_MASK, val)
468#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_CODING_FMT_PREP(val) \
469 FIELD_PREP(BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_CODING_FMT_MASK, val)
470
471#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_AIR_CODING_FMT_GET(val) \
472 FIELD_GET(BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_AIR_CODING_FMT_MASK, val)
473#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_PCM_BIT_POS_GET(val) \
474 FIELD_GET(BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_PCM_BIT_POS_MASK, val)
475#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_SAMPLE_SIZE_GET(val) \
476 FIELD_GET(BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_SAMPLE_SIZE_MASK, val)
477#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_DATA_FMT_GET(val) FIELD_GET(BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_DATA_FMT_MASK, val)
478#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_CODING_FMT_GET(val) \
479 FIELD_GET(BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_CODING_FMT_MASK, val)
480
481#define BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTINGS(air_coding_fmt, pcm_bit_pos, sample_size, data_fmt, coding_fmt) \
482 (BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_AIR_CODING_FMT_PREP(air_coding_fmt) | \
483 BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_PCM_BIT_POS_PREP(pcm_bit_pos) | \
484 BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_SAMPLE_SIZE_PREP(sample_size) | \
485 BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_DATA_FMT_PREP(data_fmt) | \
486 BT_HCI_VOICE_SETTING_CODING_FMT_PREP(coding_fmt))
487
488#define BT_HCI_SCO_MAX_LATENCY_DEFAULT 0xffff /* do not care about SCO link latency */
489
490#define BT_HCI_SCO_RETRANS_EFFORT_DEFAULT 0xff /* do not care about SCO retransmission effort */
491
492#define BT_HCI_OP_SETUP_SYNC_CONN BT_OP(BT_OGF_LINK_CTRL, 0x0028) /* 0x0428 */
493struct bt_hci_cp_setup_sync_conn {

496 uint32_t rx_bandwidth;
497 uint16_t max_latency;
498 uint16_t content_format;
499 uint8_t retrans_effort;
500 uint16_t pkt_type;
501} __packed;
502
503#define BT_HCI_OP_ACCEPT_SYNC_CONN_REQ BT_OP(BT_OGF_LINK_CTRL, 0x0029) /* 0x0429 */
504struct bt_hci_cp_accept_sync_conn_req {

507 uint32_t rx_bandwidth;
508 uint16_t max_latency;
509 uint16_t content_format;
510 uint8_t retrans_effort;
511 uint16_t pkt_type;
512} __packed;
513

947

950} __packed;

952/* HCI version from Assigned Numbers */
953#define BT_HCI_VERSION_1_0B 0
954#define BT_HCI_VERSION_1_1 1
955#define BT_HCI_VERSION_1_2 2
956#define BT_HCI_VERSION_2_0 3
957#define BT_HCI_VERSION_2_1 4
958#define BT_HCI_VERSION_3_0 5
959#define BT_HCI_VERSION_4_0 6
960#define BT_HCI_VERSION_4_1 7
961#define BT_HCI_VERSION_4_2 8

963#define BT_HCI_VERSION_5_1 10
964#define BT_HCI_VERSION_5_2 11
965#define BT_HCI_VERSION_5_3 12

967#define BT_HCI_VERSION_6_0 14
968#define BT_HCI_VERSION_6_1 15

1019/* logic transport type bits as returned when reading supported codecs */
1020#define BT_HCI_CODEC_TRANSPORT_MASK_BREDR_ACL BIT(0)
1021#define BT_HCI_CODEC_TRANSPORT_MASK_BREDR_SCO BIT(1)
1022#define BT_HCI_CODEC_TRANSPORT_MASK_LE_CIS BIT(2)
1023#define BT_HCI_CODEC_TRANSPORT_MASK_LE_BIS BIT(3)
1024
1025/* logic transport types for reading codec capabilities and controller delays */
1026#define BT_HCI_LOGICAL_TRANSPORT_TYPE_BREDR_ACL 0x00
1027#define BT_HCI_LOGICAL_TRANSPORT_TYPE_BREDR_SCO 0x01
1028#define BT_HCI_LOGICAL_TRANSPORT_TYPE_LE_CIS 0x02
1029#define BT_HCI_LOGICAL_TRANSPORT_TYPE_LE_BIS 0x03
1030
1031/* audio datapath directions */
1032#define BT_HCI_DATAPATH_DIR_HOST_TO_CTLR 0x00
1033#define BT_HCI_DATAPATH_DIR_CTLR_TO_HOST 0x01
1034
1035/* audio datapath IDs */
1036#define BT_HCI_DATAPATH_ID_HCI 0x00
1037#define BT_HCI_DATAPATH_ID_VS 0x01
1038#define BT_HCI_DATAPATH_ID_VS_END 0xfe
1039
1040/* coding format assigned numbers, used for codec IDs */
1041#define BT_HCI_CODING_FORMAT_ULAW_LOG 0x00
1042#define BT_HCI_CODING_FORMAT_ALAW_LOG 0x01
1043#define BT_HCI_CODING_FORMAT_CVSD 0x02
1044#define BT_HCI_CODING_FORMAT_TRANSPARENT 0x03
1045#define BT_HCI_CODING_FORMAT_LINEAR_PCM 0x04
1046#define BT_HCI_CODING_FORMAT_MSBC 0x05
1047#define BT_HCI_CODING_FORMAT_LC3 0x06
1048#define BT_HCI_CODING_FORMAT_G729A 0x07
1049#define BT_HCI_CODING_FORMAT_VS 0xFF
1050
1051
1052#define BT_HCI_OP_READ_CODECS BT_OP(BT_OGF_INFO, 0x000b) /* 0x100b */

1055} __packed;
1056struct bt_hci_std_codecs {

1059} __packed;

1063} __packed;

1067} __packed;

1072} __packed;

1091} __packed;

1094 /* other fields filled in dynamically */

1096} __packed;

1537/* All limits according to BT Core spec 5.4 [Vol 4, Part E, 7.8.46] */

1539#define BT_HCI_LE_MAX_TX_OCTETS_MAX 0x00FB
1540#define BT_HCI_LE_MAX_RX_OCTETS_MIN 0x001B
1541#define BT_HCI_LE_MAX_RX_OCTETS_MAX 0x00FB
1542
1543#define BT_HCI_LE_MAX_TX_TIME_MIN 0x0148
1544#define BT_HCI_LE_MAX_TX_TIME_MAX 0x4290
1545#define BT_HCI_LE_MAX_RX_TIME_MIN 0x0148
1546#define BT_HCI_LE_MAX_RX_TIME_MAX 0x4290

1555} __packed;

1915#define BT_HCI_LE_PER_ADV_CREATE_SYNC_CTE_TYPE_ALLOWED_BITS 5
1916#define BT_HCI_LE_PER_ADV_CREATE_SYNC_CTE_TYPE_INVALID_VALUE \

2949 uint8_t t_ip2_time;
2950 uint8_t t_fcs_time;
2951 uint8_t t_pm_time;
2952 uint8_t t_sw_time;

2955 uint8_t cs_enhancements_1;
2956 uint8_t snr_control_initiator;
2957 uint8_t snr_control_reflector;
2958 uint16_t drbg_nonce;
2959 uint8_t channel_map_repetition;
2960 uint16_t override_config;
2961 uint8_t override_parameters_length;
2962 uint8_t override_parameters_data[];
2963} __packed;

2998#define BT_HCI_LE_FRAME_SPACE_UPDATE_PHY_1M_MASK BIT(0)
2999#define BT_HCI_LE_FRAME_SPACE_UPDATE_PHY_2M_MASK BIT(1)
3000#define BT_HCI_LE_FRAME_SPACE_UPDATE_PHY_CODED_MASK BIT(2)
3001
3002#define BT_HCI_LE_FRAME_SPACE_UPDATE_SPACING_TYPE_IFS_ACL_CP_MASK BIT(0)
3003#define BT_HCI_LE_FRAME_SPACE_UPDATE_SPACING_TYPE_IFS_ACL_PC_MASK BIT(1)
3004#define BT_HCI_LE_FRAME_SPACE_UPDATE_SPACING_TYPE_MCES_MASK BIT(2)
3005#define BT_HCI_LE_FRAME_SPACE_UPDATE_SPACING_TYPE_IFS_CIS_MASK BIT(3)
3006#define BT_HCI_LE_FRAME_SPACE_UPDATE_SPACING_TYPE_MSS_CIS_MASK BIT(4)
3007
3008#define BT_HCI_LE_FRAME_SPACE_UPDATE_INITIATOR_LOCAL_HOST (0)
3009#define BT_HCI_LE_FRAME_SPACE_UPDATE_INITIATOR_LOCAL_CONTROLLER (1)
3010#define BT_HCI_LE_FRAME_SPACE_UPDATE_INITIATOR_PEER (2)
3011

3018} __packed;
3019
3020#define BT_HCI_OP_LE_FRAME_SPACE_UPDATE BT_OP(BT_OGF_LE, 0x009D) /* 0x209D */

3023#define BT_HCI_LE_SCI_INTERVAL_MIN_125US (0x0003U)
3024#define BT_HCI_LE_SCI_INTERVAL_MAX_125US (0x7D00U)
3025#define BT_HCI_LE_SCI_INTERVAL_MIN_US (375U)
3026#define BT_HCI_LE_SCI_INTERVAL_MAX_US (4000000U)
3027#define BT_HCI_LE_SCI_INTERVAL_UNIT_US (125U)
3028
3029#define BT_HCI_LE_SCI_STRIDE_MIN_125US (0x0001U)
3030
3031#define BT_HCI_LE_MIN_SUPP_CONN_INT_MIN_US (375U)
3032#define BT_HCI_LE_MIN_SUPP_CONN_INT_MAX_US (7500U)

3057 uint16_t subrate_max;
3058 uint16_t max_latency;
3059 uint16_t continuation_number;
3060 uint16_t supervision_timeout;
3061 uint16_t min_ce_len;
3062 uint16_t max_ce_len;
3063} __packed;

3067struct bt_hci_op_le_connection_rate_request {

3078} __packed;

3080#define BT_HCI_OP_LE_CONNECTION_RATE_REQUEST BT_OP(BT_OGF_LE, 0x00A1) /* 0x20A1 */

3082/* Event definitions */
3083
3084#define BT_HCI_EVT_UNKNOWN 0x00
3085#define BT_HCI_EVT_VENDOR 0xff
3086
3087#define BT_HCI_EVT_INQUIRY_COMPLETE 0x01
3088struct bt_hci_evt_inquiry_complete {
3089 uint8_t status;
3090} __packed;
3091
3092#define BT_HCI_EVT_CONN_COMPLETE 0x03
3093struct bt_hci_evt_conn_complete {
3094 uint8_t status;
3095 uint16_t handle;
3096 bt_addr_t bdaddr;
3097 uint8_t link_type;
3098 uint8_t encr_enabled;
3099} __packed;
3100
3101#define BT_HCI_EVT_CONN_REQUEST 0x04
3102struct bt_hci_evt_conn_request {
3103 bt_addr_t bdaddr;
3104 uint8_t dev_class[3];
3105 uint8_t link_type;
3106} __packed;
3107
3108#define BT_HCI_EVT_DISCONN_COMPLETE 0x05
3109struct bt_hci_evt_disconn_complete {
3110 uint8_t status;
3111 uint16_t handle;
3112 uint8_t reason;
3113} __packed;
3114
3115#define BT_HCI_EVT_AUTH_COMPLETE 0x06
3116struct bt_hci_evt_auth_complete {
3117 uint8_t status;
3118 uint16_t handle;
3119} __packed;
3120
3121#define BT_HCI_EVT_REMOTE_NAME_REQ_COMPLETE 0x07
3122struct bt_hci_evt_remote_name_req_complete {
3123 uint8_t status;
3124 bt_addr_t bdaddr;
3125 uint8_t name[248];
3126} __packed;
3127
3128/* Encryption Value */
3129#define BT_HCI_ENCRYPTION_OFF 0x00
3130#define BT_HCI_ENCRYPTION_ON_LE_AES_CCM 0x01
3131#define BT_HCI_ENCRYPTION_ON_BR_E0 0x01
3132#define BT_HCI_ENCRYPTION_ON_BR_AES_CCM 0x02
3133
3134#define BT_HCI_EVT_ENCRYPT_CHANGE 0x08
3135struct bt_hci_evt_encrypt_change {
3136 uint8_t status;
3137 uint16_t handle;
3138 uint8_t encrypt;
3139} __packed;
3140
3141#define BT_HCI_EVT_REMOTE_FEATURES 0x0b
3142struct bt_hci_evt_remote_features {
3143 uint8_t status;
3144 uint16_t handle;
3145 uint8_t features[8];
3146} __packed;
3147

3151 uint16_t handle;
3152 uint8_t version;
3153 uint16_t manufacturer;
3154 uint16_t subversion;
3155} __packed;
3156
3157#define BT_HCI_EVT_CMD_COMPLETE 0x0e
3158struct bt_hci_evt_cmd_complete {
3159 uint8_t ncmd;
3160 uint16_t opcode;
3161} __packed;
3162
3163struct bt_hci_evt_cc_status {
3164 uint8_t status;
3165} __packed;
3166
3167#define BT_HCI_EVT_CMD_STATUS 0x0f
3168struct bt_hci_evt_cmd_status {
3169 uint8_t status;
3170 uint8_t ncmd;
3171 uint16_t opcode;
3172} __packed;
3173
3174#define BT_HCI_EVT_HARDWARE_ERROR 0x10
3175struct bt_hci_evt_hardware_error {
3176 uint8_t hardware_code;
3177} __packed;
3178
3179#define BT_HCI_EVT_ROLE_CHANGE 0x12
3180struct bt_hci_evt_role_change {

3182 bt_addr_t bdaddr;
3183 uint8_t role;
3184} __packed;
3185
3186#define BT_HCI_EVT_NUM_COMPLETED_PACKETS 0x13
3187struct bt_hci_evt_num_completed_packets {
3188 uint8_t num_handles;
3189 struct bt_hci_handle_count h[0];
3190} __packed;
3191
3192/* Current mode */
3193#define BT_ACTIVE_MODE 0x00
3194#define BT_HOLD_MODE 0x01
3195#define BT_SNIFF_MODE 0x02
3196
3197#define BT_HCI_EVT_MODE_CHANGE 0x14
3198struct bt_hci_evt_mode_change {

3203} __packed;
3204
3205#define BT_HCI_EVT_PIN_CODE_REQ 0x16
3206struct bt_hci_evt_pin_code_req {
3207 bt_addr_t bdaddr;
3208} __packed;
3209
3210#define BT_HCI_EVT_LINK_KEY_REQ 0x17
3211struct bt_hci_evt_link_key_req {
3212 bt_addr_t bdaddr;
3213} __packed;
3214
3215/* Link Key types */
3216#define BT_LK_COMBINATION 0x00
3217#define BT_LK_LOCAL_UNIT 0x01
3218#define BT_LK_REMOTE_UNIT 0x02
3219#define BT_LK_DEBUG_COMBINATION 0x03
3220#define BT_LK_UNAUTH_COMBINATION_P192 0x04
3221#define BT_LK_AUTH_COMBINATION_P192 0x05
3222#define BT_LK_CHANGED_COMBINATION 0x06
3223#define BT_LK_UNAUTH_COMBINATION_P256 0x07
3224#define BT_LK_AUTH_COMBINATION_P256 0x08
3225
3226#define BT_HCI_EVT_LINK_KEY_NOTIFY 0x18
3227struct bt_hci_evt_link_key_notify {

3230 uint8_t key_type;
3231} __packed;
3232
3233/* Overflow link types */
3234#define BT_OVERFLOW_LINK_SYNCH 0x00
3235#define BT_OVERFLOW_LINK_ACL 0x01
3236#define BT_OVERFLOW_LINK_ISO 0x02
3237

3241} __packed;

3251} __packed;
3252

3288} __packed;
3289

3559#define BT_HCI_EVT_LE_EXT_ADVERTISING_REPORT 0x0d
3560
3561#define BT_HCI_LE_ADV_EVT_TYPE_CONN BIT(0)
3562#define BT_HCI_LE_ADV_EVT_TYPE_SCAN BIT(1)
3563#define BT_HCI_LE_ADV_EVT_TYPE_DIRECT BIT(2)
3564#define BT_HCI_LE_ADV_EVT_TYPE_SCAN_RSP BIT(3)
3565#define BT_HCI_LE_ADV_EVT_TYPE_LEGACY BIT(4)
3566
3567#define BT_HCI_LE_ADV_EVT_TYPE_DATA_STATUS(ev_type) (((ev_type) >> 5) & 0x03)
3568#define BT_HCI_LE_ADV_EVT_TYPE_DATA_STATUS_COMPLETE 0
3569#define BT_HCI_LE_ADV_EVT_TYPE_DATA_STATUS_PARTIAL 1
3570#define BT_HCI_LE_ADV_EVT_TYPE_DATA_STATUS_INCOMPLETE 2
3571#define BT_HCI_LE_ADV_EVT_TYPE_DATA_STATUS_RX_FAILED 0xFF
3572
3573/* Advertising Coding Selection extended advertising report PHY values.
3574 * Only used when Kconfig BT_EXT_ADV_CODING_SELECTION is enabled.
3575 */
3576#define BT_HCI_LE_ADV_EVT_PHY_1M 0x01
3577#define BT_HCI_LE_ADV_EVT_PHY_2M 0x02
3578#define BT_HCI_LE_ADV_EVT_PHY_CODED_S8 0x03
3579#define BT_HCI_LE_ADV_EVT_PHY_CODED_S2 0x04
3580
3581struct bt_hci_evt_le_ext_advertising_info {
3582 uint16_t evt_type;
3583 bt_addr_le_t addr;
3584 uint8_t prim_phy;
3585 uint8_t sec_phy;
3586 uint8_t sid;
3587 int8_t tx_power;
3588 int8_t rssi;
3589 uint16_t interval;
3590 bt_addr_le_t direct_addr;
3591 uint8_t length;
3592 uint8_t data[0];
3593} __packed;
3594struct bt_hci_evt_le_ext_advertising_report {
3595 uint8_t num_reports;
3596 struct bt_hci_evt_le_ext_advertising_info adv_info[0];
3597} __packed;
3598
3599#define BT_HCI_EVT_LE_PER_ADV_SYNC_ESTABLISHED 0x0e

3606 uint16_t interval;
3607 uint8_t clock_accuracy;
3608} __packed;

3697#define BT_HCI_EVT_LE_CTE_REQUEST_FAILED 0x17

3699 /* According to BT 5.3 Core Spec the status field may have following
3700 * values:
3701 * - BT_HCI_CTE_REQ_STATUS_RSP_WITHOUT_CTE when received LL_CTE_RSP_PDU without CTE.
3702 * - Other Controller error code for peer rejected request.
3703 */
3704 uint8_t status;
3705 uint16_t conn_handle;
3706} __packed;

4104#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_PROCEDURE_ABORT_REASON_NO_ABORT 0x0
4105#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_PROCEDURE_ABORT_REASON_LOCAL_HOST_OR_REMOTE_REQUEST 0x1
4106#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_PROCEDURE_ABORT_REASON_TOO_FEW_CHANNELS 0x2
4107#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_PROCEDURE_ABORT_REASON_CHMAP_INSTANT_PASSED 0x3
4108#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_PROCEDURE_ABORT_REASON_UNSPECIFIED 0xF
4109
4110#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_SUBEVENT_ABORT_REASON_NO_ABORT 0x0
4111#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_SUBEVENT_ABORT_REASON_LOCAL_HOST_OR_REMOTE_REQUEST 0x1
4112#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_SUBEVENT_ABORT_REASON_NO_CS_SYNC_RECEIVED 0x2
4113#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_SUBEVENT_ABORT_REASON_SCHED_CONFLICT 0x3
4114#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_SUBEVENT_ABORT_REASON_UNSPECIFIED 0xF
4115
4116#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_SUBEVENT_RESULT_N_AP_IGNORED 0x00
4117#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_SUBEVENT_RESULT_N_AP_1 0x01
4118#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_SUBEVENT_RESULT_N_AP_2 0x02
4119#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_SUBEVENT_RESULT_N_AP_3 0x03
4120#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_SUBEVENT_RESULT_N_AP_4 0x04
4121
4122#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_SUBEVENT_RESULT_FREQ_COMPENSATION_NOT_AVAILABLE 0xC000
4123
4124#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_SUBEVENT_RESULT_PCT_NOT_AVAILABLE 0xFFFFFFFF
4125
4126#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_REF_POWER_LEVEL_UNAVAILABLE 0x7F
4127
4128#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_PCT_I_MASK 0x000FFF
4129#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_PCT_Q_MASK 0xFFF000
4130
4131#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_TONE_QUALITY_HIGH 0x0
4132#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_TONE_QUALITY_MED 0x1
4133#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_TONE_QUALITY_LOW 0x2
4134#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_TONE_QUALITY_UNAVAILABLE 0x3
4135
4136#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_NOT_TONE_EXT_SLOT 0x0
4137#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_TONE_EXT_SLOT_EXT_NOT_EXPECTED 0x1
4138#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_TONE_EXT_SLOT_EXT_EXPECTED 0x2
4139
4140#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_TIME_DIFFERENCE_NOT_AVAILABLE ((int16_t)0x8000)
4141
4142#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_PACKET_NADM_ATTACK_EXT_UNLIKELY 0x00
4143#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_PACKET_NADM_ATTACK_VERY_UNLIKELY 0x01
4144#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_PACKET_NADM_ATTACK_UNLIKELY 0x02
4145#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_PACKET_NADM_ATTACK_POSSIBLE 0x03
4146#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_PACKET_NADM_ATTACK_LIKELY 0x04
4147#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_PACKET_NADM_ATTACK_VERY_LIKELY 0x05
4148#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_PACKET_NADM_ATTACK_EXT_LIKELY 0x06
4149#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_PACKET_NADM_UNKNOWN 0xFF
4150
4151#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_PACKET_QUALITY_AA_CHECK_SUCCESSFUL 0x0
4152#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_PACKET_QUALITY_AA_CHECK_BIT_ERRORS_FOUND 0x1
4153#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_PACKET_QUALITY_AA_CHECK_AA_NOT_FOUND 0x2
4154
4155#define BT_HCI_LE_CS_PACKET_RSSI_NOT_AVAILABLE 0x7F
4156
4157#define BT_HCI_EVT_LE_CS_SUBEVENT_RESULT 0x31
4159struct bt_hci_le_cs_step_data_mode_0_initiator {
4160#ifdef CONFIG_LITTLE_ENDIAN

4162 uint8_t packet_quality_bit_errors: 4;
4163#else
4164 uint8_t packet_quality_bit_errors: 4;
4165 uint8_t packet_quality_aa_check: 4;
4166#endif /* CONFIG_LITTLE_ENDIAN */

4168 uint8_t packet_antenna;
4169 uint16_t measured_freq_offset;
4170} __packed;

4284struct bt_hci_evt_le_cs_subevent_result_step {

4286 uint8_t step_channel;
4287 uint8_t step_data_length;
4288 uint8_t step_data[];
4289} __packed;
4290
4291struct bt_hci_evt_le_cs_subevent_result {
4292 uint16_t conn_handle;
4293 uint8_t config_id;
4294 uint16_t start_acl_conn_event_counter;
4295 uint16_t procedure_counter;
4296 uint16_t frequency_compensation;
4297 uint8_t reference_power_level;
4298 uint8_t procedure_done_status;
4299 uint8_t subevent_done_status;
4300#ifdef CONFIG_LITTLE_ENDIAN
4301 uint8_t procedure_abort_reason: 4;
4302 uint8_t subevent_abort_reason: 4;
4303#else
4304 uint8_t subevent_abort_reason: 4;
4305 uint8_t procedure_abort_reason: 4;
4306#endif /* CONFIG_LITTLE_ENDIAN */
4307 uint8_t num_antenna_paths;
4308 uint8_t num_steps_reported;
4309 uint8_t steps[];
4310} __packed;
4311
4312#define BT_HCI_EVT_LE_CS_SUBEVENT_RESULT_CONTINUE 0x32
4313
4314struct bt_hci_evt_le_cs_subevent_result_continue {
4315 uint16_t conn_handle;
4316 uint8_t config_id;
4317 uint8_t procedure_done_status;
4318 uint8_t subevent_done_status;
4319#ifdef CONFIG_LITTLE_ENDIAN
4320 uint8_t procedure_abort_reason: 4;
4321 uint8_t subevent_abort_reason: 4;
4322#else
4323 uint8_t subevent_abort_reason: 4;
4324 uint8_t procedure_abort_reason: 4;
4325#endif /* CONFIG_LITTLE_ENDIAN */
4326 uint8_t num_antenna_paths;
4327 uint8_t num_steps_reported;
4328 uint8_t steps[];
4329} __packed;
4330
4331#define BT_HCI_EVT_LE_CS_TEST_END_COMPLETE 0x33
4332struct bt_hci_evt_le_cs_test_end_complete {
4333 uint8_t status;
4334} __packed;
4335
4336#define BT_HCI_EVT_LE_CS_PROCEDURE_ENABLE_COMPLETE 0x30
4337struct bt_hci_evt_le_cs_procedure_enable_complete {
4338 uint8_t status;
4339 uint16_t handle;
4340 uint8_t config_id;
4341 uint8_t state;
4342 uint8_t tone_antenna_config_selection;
4343 uint8_t selected_tx_power;
4344 uint8_t subevent_len[3];
4345 uint8_t subevents_per_event;
4346 uint16_t subevent_interval;
4347 uint16_t event_interval;
4348 uint16_t procedure_interval;
4349 uint16_t procedure_count;
4350 uint16_t max_procedure_len;
4351} __packed;
4352
4353#define BT_HCI_EVT_LE_FRAME_SPACE_UPDATE_COMPLETE 0x35
4354struct bt_hci_evt_le_frame_space_update_complete {
4355 uint8_t status;
4356 uint16_t handle;
4357 uint8_t initiator;
4358 uint16_t frame_space;
4359 uint8_t phys;
4360 uint16_t spacing_types;
4361} __packed;
4362
4363#define BT_HCI_EVT_LE_CONN_RATE_CHANGE 0x37
4364struct bt_hci_evt_le_conn_rate_change {
4365 uint8_t status;
4366 uint16_t handle;
4367 uint16_t conn_interval;
4368 uint16_t subrate_factor;
4369 uint16_t peripheral_latency;
4370 uint16_t continuation_number;
4371 uint16_t supervision_timeout;
4372} __packed;
4373
4374/* Event mask bits */
4375
4376#define BT_EVT_BIT(n) (1ULL << (n))
4377
4378#define BT_EVT_MASK_INQUIRY_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(0)
4379#define BT_EVT_MASK_CONN_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(2)
4380#define BT_EVT_MASK_CONN_REQUEST BT_EVT_BIT(3)
4381#define BT_EVT_MASK_DISCONN_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(4)
4382#define BT_EVT_MASK_AUTH_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(5)
4383#define BT_EVT_MASK_REMOTE_NAME_REQ_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(6)
4384#define BT_EVT_MASK_ENCRYPT_CHANGE BT_EVT_BIT(7)
4385#define BT_EVT_MASK_REMOTE_FEATURES BT_EVT_BIT(10)
4386#define BT_EVT_MASK_REMOTE_VERSION_INFO BT_EVT_BIT(11)
4387#define BT_EVT_MASK_HARDWARE_ERROR BT_EVT_BIT(15)
4388#define BT_EVT_MASK_ROLE_CHANGE BT_EVT_BIT(17)
4389#define BT_EVT_MASK_MODE_CHANGE BT_EVT_BIT(19)
4390#define BT_EVT_MASK_PIN_CODE_REQ BT_EVT_BIT(21)
4391#define BT_EVT_MASK_LINK_KEY_REQ BT_EVT_BIT(22)
4392#define BT_EVT_MASK_LINK_KEY_NOTIFY BT_EVT_BIT(23)
4393#define BT_EVT_MASK_DATA_BUFFER_OVERFLOW BT_EVT_BIT(25)
4394#define BT_EVT_MASK_INQUIRY_RESULT_WITH_RSSI BT_EVT_BIT(33)
4395#define BT_EVT_MASK_REMOTE_EXT_FEATURES BT_EVT_BIT(34)
4396#define BT_EVT_MASK_SYNC_CONN_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(43)
4397#define BT_EVT_MASK_EXTENDED_INQUIRY_RESULT BT_EVT_BIT(46)
4398#define BT_EVT_MASK_ENCRYPT_KEY_REFRESH_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(47)
4399#define BT_EVT_MASK_IO_CAPA_REQ BT_EVT_BIT(48)
4400#define BT_EVT_MASK_IO_CAPA_RESP BT_EVT_BIT(49)
4401#define BT_EVT_MASK_USER_CONFIRM_REQ BT_EVT_BIT(50)
4402#define BT_EVT_MASK_USER_PASSKEY_REQ BT_EVT_BIT(51)
4403#define BT_EVT_MASK_SSP_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(53)
4404#define BT_EVT_MASK_USER_PASSKEY_NOTIFY BT_EVT_BIT(58)
4405#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_META_EVENT BT_EVT_BIT(61)
4406
4407/* Page 2 */
4408#define BT_EVT_MASK_NUM_COMPLETE_DATA_BLOCKS BT_EVT_BIT(8)
4409#define BT_EVT_MASK_TRIGG_CLOCK_CAPTURE BT_EVT_BIT(14)
4410#define BT_EVT_MASK_SYNCH_TRAIN_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(15)
4411#define BT_EVT_MASK_SYNCH_TRAIN_RX BT_EVT_BIT(16)
4412#define BT_EVT_MASK_CL_PER_BC_RX BT_EVT_BIT(17)
4413#define BT_EVT_MASK_CL_PER_BC_TIMEOUT BT_EVT_BIT(18)
4414#define BT_EVT_MASK_TRUNC_PAGE_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(19)
4415#define BT_EVT_MASK_PER_PAGE_RSP_TIMEOUT BT_EVT_BIT(20)
4416#define BT_EVT_MASK_CL_PER_BC_CH_MAP_CHANGE BT_EVT_BIT(21)
4417#define BT_EVT_MASK_INQUIRY_RSP_NOT BT_EVT_BIT(22)
4418#define BT_EVT_MASK_AUTH_PAYLOAD_TIMEOUT_EXP BT_EVT_BIT(23)
4419#define BT_EVT_MASK_SAM_STATUS_CHANGE BT_EVT_BIT(24)
4420
4421#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_CONN_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(0)
4422#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_ADVERTISING_REPORT BT_EVT_BIT(1)
4423#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_CONN_UPDATE_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(2)
4424#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_REMOTE_FEAT_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(3)
4425#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_LTK_REQUEST BT_EVT_BIT(4)
4426#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_CONN_PARAM_REQ BT_EVT_BIT(5)
4427#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_DATA_LEN_CHANGE BT_EVT_BIT(6)
4428#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_P256_PUBLIC_KEY_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(7)
4429#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_GENERATE_DHKEY_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(8)
4430#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_ENH_CONN_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(9)
4431#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_DIRECT_ADV_REPORT BT_EVT_BIT(10)
4432#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_PHY_UPDATE_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(11)
4433#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_EXT_ADVERTISING_REPORT BT_EVT_BIT(12)
4434#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_PER_ADV_SYNC_ESTABLISHED BT_EVT_BIT(13)
4435#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_PER_ADVERTISING_REPORT BT_EVT_BIT(14)
4436#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_PER_ADV_SYNC_LOST BT_EVT_BIT(15)
4437#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_SCAN_TIMEOUT BT_EVT_BIT(16)
4438#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_ADV_SET_TERMINATED BT_EVT_BIT(17)
4439#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_SCAN_REQ_RECEIVED BT_EVT_BIT(18)
4440#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_CHAN_SEL_ALGO BT_EVT_BIT(19)
4441#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_CONNECTIONLESS_IQ_REPORT BT_EVT_BIT(20)
4442#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_CONNECTION_IQ_REPORT BT_EVT_BIT(21)
4443#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_CTE_REQUEST_FAILED BT_EVT_BIT(22)
4444#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_PAST_RECEIVED BT_EVT_BIT(23)
4445#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_CIS_ESTABLISHED BT_EVT_BIT(24)
4446#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_CIS_REQ BT_EVT_BIT(25)
4447#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_BIG_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(26)
4448#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_BIG_TERMINATED BT_EVT_BIT(27)
4449#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_BIG_SYNC_ESTABLISHED BT_EVT_BIT(28)
4450#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_BIG_SYNC_LOST BT_EVT_BIT(29)
4451#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_REQ_PEER_SCA_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(30)
4452#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_PATH_LOSS_THRESHOLD BT_EVT_BIT(31)
4453#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_TRANSMIT_POWER_REPORTING BT_EVT_BIT(32)
4454#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_BIGINFO_ADV_REPORT BT_EVT_BIT(33)
4455#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_SUBRATE_CHANGE BT_EVT_BIT(34)
4456
4457#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_PER_ADV_SYNC_ESTABLISHED_V2 BT_EVT_BIT(35)
4458#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_PER_ADVERTISING_REPORT_V2 BT_EVT_BIT(36)
4459#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_PAST_RECEIVED_V2 BT_EVT_BIT(37)
4460#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_PER_ADV_SUBEVENT_DATA_REQ BT_EVT_BIT(38)
4461#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_PER_ADV_RESPONSE_REPORT BT_EVT_BIT(39)
4462#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_ENH_CONN_COMPLETE_V2 BT_EVT_BIT(40)
4463#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_CIS_ESTABLISHED_V2 BT_EVT_BIT(41)
4464
4465#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_READ_ALL_REMOTE_FEAT_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(42)
4466
4467#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_CS_READ_REMOTE_SUPPORTED_CAPABILITIES_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(43)
4468#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_CS_READ_REMOTE_FAE_TABLE_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(44)
4469#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_CS_SECURITY_ENABLE_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(45)
4470#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_CS_CONFIG_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(46)
4471#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_CS_PROCEDURE_ENABLE_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(47)
4472#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_CS_SUBEVENT_RESULT BT_EVT_BIT(48)
4473#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_CS_SUBEVENT_RESULT_CONTINUE BT_EVT_BIT(49)
4474#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_CS_TEST_END_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(50)
4475
4476#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_FRAME_SPACE_UPDATE_COMPLETE BT_EVT_BIT(52)
4477#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_CONN_RATE_CHANGE BT_EVT_BIT(54)
4478
4480#define BT_EVT_MASK_LE_CS_READ_REMOTE_SUPPORTED_CAPABILITIES_COMPLETE_V2 BT_EVT_BIT(55)
4481
4483#define BT_HCI_ERR_SUCCESS 0x00
4484#define BT_HCI_ERR_UNKNOWN_CMD 0x01
4485#define BT_HCI_ERR_UNKNOWN_CONN_ID 0x02
4486#define BT_HCI_ERR_HW_FAILURE 0x03
4487#define BT_HCI_ERR_PAGE_TIMEOUT 0x04
4488#define BT_HCI_ERR_AUTH_FAIL 0x05
4489#define BT_HCI_ERR_PIN_OR_KEY_MISSING 0x06
4490#define BT_HCI_ERR_MEM_CAPACITY_EXCEEDED 0x07
4491#define BT_HCI_ERR_CONN_TIMEOUT 0x08
4492#define BT_HCI_ERR_CONN_LIMIT_EXCEEDED 0x09
4493#define BT_HCI_ERR_SYNC_CONN_LIMIT_EXCEEDED 0x0a
4494#define BT_HCI_ERR_CONN_ALREADY_EXISTS 0x0b
4495#define BT_HCI_ERR_CMD_DISALLOWED 0x0c
4496#define BT_HCI_ERR_INSUFFICIENT_RESOURCES 0x0d
4497#define BT_HCI_ERR_INSUFFICIENT_SECURITY 0x0e
4498#define BT_HCI_ERR_BD_ADDR_UNACCEPTABLE 0x0f
4499#define BT_HCI_ERR_CONN_ACCEPT_TIMEOUT 0x10
4500#define BT_HCI_ERR_UNSUPP_FEATURE_PARAM_VAL 0x11
4501#define BT_HCI_ERR_INVALID_PARAM 0x12
4502#define BT_HCI_ERR_REMOTE_USER_TERM_CONN 0x13
4503#define BT_HCI_ERR_REMOTE_LOW_RESOURCES 0x14
4504#define BT_HCI_ERR_REMOTE_POWER_OFF 0x15
4505#define BT_HCI_ERR_LOCALHOST_TERM_CONN 0x16
4506#define BT_HCI_ERR_REPEATED_ATTEMPTS 0x17
4507#define BT_HCI_ERR_PAIRING_NOT_ALLOWED 0x18
4508#define BT_HCI_ERR_UNKNOWN_LMP_PDU 0x19
4509#define BT_HCI_ERR_UNSUPP_REMOTE_FEATURE 0x1a
4510#define BT_HCI_ERR_SCO_OFFSET_REJECTED 0x1b
4511#define BT_HCI_ERR_SCO_INTERVAL_REJECTED 0x1c
4512#define BT_HCI_ERR_SCO_AIR_MODE_REJECTED 0x1d
4513#define BT_HCI_ERR_INVALID_LL_PARAM 0x1e
4514#define BT_HCI_ERR_UNSPECIFIED 0x1f
4515#define BT_HCI_ERR_UNSUPP_LL_PARAM_VAL 0x20
4516#define BT_HCI_ERR_ROLE_CHANGE_NOT_ALLOWED 0x21
4517#define BT_HCI_ERR_LL_RESP_TIMEOUT 0x22
4518#define BT_HCI_ERR_LL_PROC_COLLISION 0x23
4519#define BT_HCI_ERR_LMP_PDU_NOT_ALLOWED 0x24
4520#define BT_HCI_ERR_ENC_MODE_NOT_ACCEPTABLE 0x25
4521#define BT_HCI_ERR_LINK_KEY_CANNOT_BE_CHANGED 0x26
4522#define BT_HCI_ERR_REQUESTED_QOS_NOT_SUPPORTED 0x27
4523#define BT_HCI_ERR_INSTANT_PASSED 0x28
4524#define BT_HCI_ERR_PAIRING_NOT_SUPPORTED 0x29
4525#define BT_HCI_ERR_DIFF_TRANS_COLLISION 0x2a
4526#define BT_HCI_ERR_QOS_UNACCEPTABLE_PARAM 0x2c
4527#define BT_HCI_ERR_QOS_REJECTED 0x2d
4528#define BT_HCI_ERR_CHAN_ASSESS_NOT_SUPPORTED 0x2e
4529#define BT_HCI_ERR_INSUFF_SECURITY 0x2f
4530#define BT_HCI_ERR_PARAM_OUT_OF_MANDATORY_RANGE 0x30
4531#define BT_HCI_ERR_ROLE_SWITCH_PENDING 0x32
4532#define BT_HCI_ERR_RESERVED_SLOT_VIOLATION 0x34
4533#define BT_HCI_ERR_ROLE_SWITCH_FAILED 0x35
4534#define BT_HCI_ERR_EXT_INQ_RESP_TOO_LARGE 0x36
4535#define BT_HCI_ERR_SIMPLE_PAIR_NOT_SUPP_BY_HOST 0x37
4536#define BT_HCI_ERR_HOST_BUSY_PAIRING 0x38
4537#define BT_HCI_ERR_CONN_REJECTED_DUE_TO_NO_CHAN 0x39
4538#define BT_HCI_ERR_CONTROLLER_BUSY 0x3a
4539#define BT_HCI_ERR_UNACCEPT_CONN_PARAM 0x3b
4540#define BT_HCI_ERR_ADV_TIMEOUT 0x3c
4541#define BT_HCI_ERR_TERM_DUE_TO_MIC_FAIL 0x3d
4542#define BT_HCI_ERR_CONN_FAIL_TO_ESTAB 0x3e
4543#define BT_HCI_ERR_MAC_CONN_FAILED 0x3f
4544#define BT_HCI_ERR_CLOCK_ADJUST_REJECTED 0x40
4545#define BT_HCI_ERR_SUBMAP_NOT_DEFINED 0x41
4546#define BT_HCI_ERR_UNKNOWN_ADV_IDENTIFIER 0x42
4547#define BT_HCI_ERR_LIMIT_REACHED 0x43
4548#define BT_HCI_ERR_OP_CANCELLED_BY_HOST 0x44
4549#define BT_HCI_ERR_PACKET_TOO_LONG 0x45
4550#define BT_HCI_ERR_TOO_LATE 0x46
4551#define BT_HCI_ERR_TOO_EARLY 0x47
4552
4553#ifdef __cplusplus
4554}
4555#endif
4556
4557#endif /* ZEPHYR_INCLUDE_BLUETOOTH_HCI_TYPES_H_ */
